title: bouvardia keniae
intro: Bouvardia keniae, also known as Mexican Bouvardia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Bouvardia keniae can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
